site.name: Claude Code Documentation
site.description: Official documentation for Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic coding tool available in the terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser. Covers installation, configuration, skills, subagents, hooks, MCP, the Agent SDK, and reference material.

pages.title: How the agent loop works
pages.description: Understand the message lifecycle, tool execution, context window, and architecture that power your SDK agents.

pages.title: Use Claude Code features in the SDK
pages.description: Load project instructions, skills, hooks, and other Claude Code features into your SDK agents.

pages.title: Track cost and usage
pages.description: Learn how to track token usage, deduplicate parallel tool calls, and calculate costs with the Claude Agent SDK.

pages.title: Give Claude custom tools
pages.description: Define custom tools with the Claude Agent SDK's in-process MCP server so Claude can call your functions, hit your APIs, and perform domain-specific operations.

pages.title: Rewind file changes with checkpointing
pages.description: Track file changes during agent sessions and restore files to any previous state

pages.title: Intercept and control agent behavior with hooks
pages.description: Intercept and customize agent behavior at key execution points with hooks

pages.title: Hosting the Agent SDK
pages.description: Deploy and host Claude Agent SDK in production environments

pages.title: Connect to external tools with MCP
pages.description: Configure MCP servers to extend your agent with external tools. Covers transport types, tool search for large tool sets, authentication, and error handling.

pages.title: Migrate to Claude Agent SDK
pages.description: Guide for migrating the Claude Code TypeScript and Python SDKs to the Claude Agent SDK

pages.title: Modifying system prompts
pages.description: Learn how to customize Claude's behavior by modifying system prompts using three approaches - output styles, systemPrompt with append, and custom system prompts.

pages.title: Observability with OpenTelemetry
pages.description: Export traces, metrics, and events from the Agent SDK to your observability backend using OpenTelemetry.

pages.title: Agent SDK overview
pages.description: Build production AI agents with Claude Code as a library

pages.title: Configure permissions
pages.description: Control how your agent uses tools with permission modes, hooks, and declarative allow/deny rules.

pages.title: Plugins in the SDK
pages.description: Load custom plugins to extend Claude Code with commands, agents, skills, and hooks through the Agent SDK

pages.title: Agent SDK reference - Python
pages.description: Complete API reference for the Python Agent SDK, including all functions, types, and classes.

pages.title: Quickstart
pages.description: Get started with the Python or TypeScript Agent SDK to build AI agents that work autonomously

pages.title: Securely deploying AI agents
pages.description: A guide to securing Claude Code and Agent SDK deployments with isolation, credential management, and network controls

pages.title: Work with sessions
pages.description: How sessions persist agent conversation history, and when to use continue, resume, and fork to return to a prior run.

pages.title: Agent Skills in the SDK
pages.description: Extend Claude with specialized capabilities using Agent Skills in the Claude Agent SDK

pages.title: Slash Commands in the SDK
pages.description: Learn how to use slash commands to control Claude Code sessions through the SDK

pages.title: Stream responses in real-time
pages.description: Get real-time responses from the Agent SDK as text and tool calls stream in

pages.description: Understanding the two input modes for Claude Agent SDK and when to use each

pages.title: Get structured output from agents
pages.description: Return validated JSON from agent workflows using JSON Schema, Zod, or Pydantic. Get type-safe, structured data after multi-turn tool use.

pages.title: Subagents in the SDK
pages.description: Define and invoke subagents to isolate context, run tasks in parallel, and apply specialized instructions in your Claude Agent SDK applications.

pages.title: Todo Lists
pages.description: Track and display todos using the Claude Agent SDK for organized task management

pages.title: Scale to many tools with tool search
pages.description: Scale your agent to thousands of tools by discovering and loading only what's needed, on demand.

pages.description: Complete API reference for the TypeScript Agent SDK, including all functions, types, and interfaces.

pages.title: TypeScript SDK V2 interface (preview)
pages.description: Preview of the simplified V2 TypeScript Agent SDK, with session-based send/stream patterns for multi-turn conversations.

pages.title: Handle approvals and user input
pages.description: Surface Claude's approval requests and clarifying questions to users, then return their decisions to the SDK.

pages.description: Coordinate multiple Claude Code instances working together as a team, with shared tasks, inter-agent messaging, and centralized management.

pages.description: Learn about configuring Claude Code through Amazon Bedrock, including setup, IAM configuration, and troubleshooting.

pages.title: Track team usage with analytics
pages.description: View Claude Code usage metrics, track adoption, and measure engineering velocity in the analytics dashboard.

pages.title: Authentication
pages.description: Log in to Claude Code and configure authentication for individuals, teams, and organizations.

pages.title: Best Practices for Claude Code
pages.description: Tips and patterns for getting the most out of Claude Code, from configuring your environment to scaling across parallel sessions.

pages.title: Changelog
pages.description: Release notes for Claude Code, including new features, improvements, and bug fixes by version.

pages.title: Push events into a running session with channels
pages.description: Use channels to push messages, alerts, and webhooks into your Claude Code session from an MCP server. Forward CI results, chat messages, and monitoring events so Claude can react while you're away.

pages.title: Channels reference
pages.description: Build an MCP server that pushes webhooks, alerts, and chat messages into a Claude Code session. Reference for the channel contract: capability declaration, notification events, reply tools, sender gating, and permission relay.

pages.description: Track, rewind, and summarize Claude's edits and conversation to manage session state.

pages.description: Configure cloud environments, setup scripts, network access, and Docker in Anthropic's sandbox. Move sessions between web and terminal with `--remote` and `--teleport`.

pages.title: Explore the .claude directory
pages.description: Where Claude Code reads CLAUDE.md, settings.json, hooks, skills, commands, subagents, rules, and auto memory. Explore the .claude directory in your project and ~/.claude in your home directory.

pages.description: Step-by-step guides for exploring codebases, fixing bugs, refactoring, testing, and other everyday tasks with Claude Code.

pages.title: Let Claude use your computer from the CLI
pages.description: Enable computer use in the Claude Code CLI so Claude can open apps, click, type, and see your screen on macOS. Test native apps, debug visual issues, and automate GUI-only tools without leaving your terminal.

pages.description: An interactive simulation of how Claude Code's context window fills during a session. See what loads automatically, what each file read costs, and when rules and hooks fire.

pages.description: Track token usage, set team spend limits, and reduce Claude Code costs with context management, model selection, extended thinking settings, and preprocessing hooks.

pages.description: Set up scheduled tasks in Claude Code Desktop to run Claude automatically on a recurring basis for daily code reviews, dependency audits, or morning briefings.

pages.title: Claude Code overview
pages.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that reads your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and integrates with your development tools. Available in your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser.

pages.title: Choose a permission mode
pages.description: Control whether Claude asks before editing files or running commands. Cycle modes with Shift+Tab in the CLI or use the mode selector in VS Code, Desktop, and claude.ai.

pages.title: Configure permissions
pages.description: Control what Claude Code can access and do with fine-grained permission rules, modes, and managed policies.

pages.title: Platforms and integrations
pages.description: Choose where to run Claude Code and what to connect it to. Compare the CLI, Desktop, VS Code, JetBrains, web, mobile, and integrations like Chrome, Slack, and CI/CD.

pages.description: Continue a local Claude Code session from your phone, tablet, or any browser using Remote Control. Works with claude.ai/code and the Claude mobile app.

pages.description: Install and configure the Claude Code extension for VS Code. Get AI coding assistance with inline diffs, @-mentions, plan review, and keyboard shortcuts.

pages.description: Run Claude Code in the cloud from your browser or phone. Connect a GitHub repository, submit a task, and review the PR without local setup.

pages.description: Auto mode for hands-off permissions, computer use built in, PR auto-fix in the cloud, transcript search, and a PowerShell tool for Windows.
